issues.description: Navigation link 'Contact' wraps to a second line in PPTX header, whereas in original HTML it stays inline on one row.

Quick Links section renders as text-only links (Docs, Support, Reports, Settings) instead of icon cards with colored backgrounds as in original HTML. Expected limitation since pptxgenjs cannot render HTML icon elements.
Notice Board category badges (Notice, Event, Update, FAQ) rendered as plain text instead of colored pill badges as in original HTML.
Legal column 'Terms of Service' wraps to two lines due to narrower text box width compared to original HTML layout.

validation.quality_notes: All 4 slides converted successfully with high fidelity. All textual content is fully preserved with no cutoff or loss. Colors, backgrounds, and shapes render correctly. Minor positioning differences are typical HTML-to-PPTX conversion artifacts (text wrapping, icon-to-text fallback). No high or medium severity issues detected. Shape rendering on slide 2 is excellent -- rectangles, rounded rects, circles, border-only shapes, and individual border sides all render accurately with correct colors.
